_publications._publicationTitle: Assessment of Mosaicism and Detection of Cryptic Alleles in CRISPR/Cas9-Engineered Neurofibromatosis Type 1 and

_contextSnippet: When CRISPOR became available (Concordet and Haeussler, 2018) and we queried our target sites, we found that a TP53 pseudogene was also targeted by the same target sequence used in our previous experiments.
details: Successfully identified that a TP53 pseudogene was also targeted by the same target sequence, providing better target site analysis than MIT's tool
